Who We Are

Rebuilding Somalia's Infrastructure

Mogadishu Construction and Rehabilitation (MCR) is a leading civil engineering and construction company headquartered in Mogadishu, Somalia. We are dedicated to developing and rehabilitating the infrastructure that Mogadishu and the wider Somali region needs to thrive.

  • Specialised in road construction using asphalt and concrete technologies
  • Expert drainage and sewage system design and installation
  • Comprehensive infrastructure rehabilitation and repair services
  • Full earthworks capability including excavation, filling, and compaction
  • End-to-end project management and engineering supervision

Home / About

About MCR

Our Story

Building Somalia's Tomorrow

Mogadishu Construction and Rehabilitation (MCR) was established to address the urgent need for professional civil engineering and infrastructure development in post-conflict Somalia. Since our founding, we have grown into one of Mogadishu's most trusted construction firms, delivering projects that transform communities and connect people.

Our team of over 40 engineers, surveyors, and skilled tradespeople bring international expertise combined with deep local knowledge to every project we undertake. We work closely with government agencies, international organisations, and private clients to deliver infrastructure that meets the highest standards of quality and durability.

Our Foundation

Mission, Vision & Purpose

🎯
Our Mission

To deliver high-quality, durable, and sustainable infrastructure solutions that improve lives, enable economic growth, and rebuild Mogadishu's urban landscape for generations to come.

👁️
Our Vision

To become the leading construction and civil engineering company in Somalia — recognised for excellence, integrity, and our transformative impact on communities across the nation.

💪
Our Commitment

We are committed to employing local talent, building capacity within our workforce, and reinvesting in the communities where we work — because Somalia's success is our success.

Core Values

What We Stand For

🤝
Integrity

We hold ourselves to the highest ethical standards in every contract, relationship, and decision — transparent and honest in all we do.

⭐
Quality

We use premium materials, rigorous testing, and best-practice engineering to ensure every structure we build lasts for decades.

🛡️
Safety

The wellbeing of our workers, clients, and communities is non-negotiable. Safety protocols are embedded in everything we do on site.

💡
Innovation

We continuously adopt modern construction techniques, technologies, and materials to deliver smarter, more efficient infrastructure.

Home / Services

Our Services

🛣️
Service 01
Road Construction

We design and construct high-quality asphalt and concrete roads built to withstand Somalia's climate and traffic demands. From urban streets to inter-city highways, our roads are engineered to last.

  • Asphalt concrete road surfacing
  • Rigid pavement (concrete) construction
  • Sub-base and base layer preparation
  • Road widening and expansion
  • Kerbing, footpaths, and road markings
  • Traffic safety systems and signage
🌊
Service 02
Drainage & Sewage Systems

Effective water management is critical to urban resilience. We design and install comprehensive stormwater drainage networks, sewage systems, and culverts that protect communities from flooding and disease.

  • Stormwater drainage channel design & construction
  • Reinforced concrete culverts and box drains
  • Sewage collection and disposal networks
  • Drainage rehabilitation and de-silting
  • Pump stations and outfall structures
  • Hydraulic modelling and design
🔧
Service 03
Infrastructure Rehabilitation

Much of Mogadishu's existing road and infrastructure network requires urgent rehabilitation. Our teams specialise in structural assessment and repair, restoring damaged infrastructure to a fully serviceable condition.

  • Pavement condition assessment and mapping
  • Full-depth reclamation and reconstruction
  • Overlay and surface treatment works
  • Bridge and structure rehabilitation
  • Pothole repair and crack sealing at scale
  • Before-and-after engineering documentation
⛏️
Service 04
Earthworks & Excavation

We deploy a fleet of modern heavy plant and machinery to handle earthworks of any scale — from site clearing and bulk excavation to precision grading and compaction for road sub-grades.

  • Bulk excavation and land clearing
  • Topographic surveying and setting out
  • Filling, grading, and fine trimming
  • Compaction testing (CBR, Proctor)
  • Trench excavation for utilities
  • Spoil disposal and site reinstatement
📋
Service 05
Project Management & Supervision

Our experienced project managers oversee every phase of the construction lifecycle — from initial feasibility and design through procurement, construction supervision, quality assurance, and final handover.

  • Feasibility studies and conceptual design
  • Tender documentation and contract management
  • Resident engineer and site supervision services
  • Quality assurance and materials testing
  • Health, safety, and environmental management
  • Progress reporting and client communication

Our Projects

Our Portfolio

Completed & Ongoing Works

Roads
Maka Al Mukarama Road Upgrade
📍 Hodan District, Mogadishu
Complete resurfacing and widening of 4.2km arterial road, including new kerbing, pavement markings, and pedestrian crossings.
Drainage
KM4 Stormwater Drainage Network
📍 Wadajir District, Mogadishu
Installation of 2.8km of reinforced concrete drainage channels eliminating chronic seasonal flooding.
Infrastructure
Airport Road Full Rehabilitation
📍 Aden Adde Airport, Mogadishu
Structural rehabilitation and 55mm asphalt overlay of the 5.5km airport corridor under a UNDP-funded programme.
Roads
Via Roma Street Reconstruction
📍 Shangani, Mogadishu
Full reconstruction of 1.8km historic street with concrete pavement, underground utilities, and street lighting.
Drainage
Dharkenley Sewage Network
📍 Dharkenley District, Mogadishu
New sewage collection network serving 12,000 residents, connecting to the municipal treatment facility.
Infrastructure
Bakaara Market Access Roads
📍 Hodan District, Mogadishu
Rehabilitation of 3.1km of market access roads and lanes, improving trade connectivity and reducing vehicle wear.
Roads
Afgoye Corridor Improvements
📍 Afgoye Road, Lower Shabelle
Emergency repair and improvement works on 12km of key inter-city corridor damaged by heavy seasonal rains.
Infrastructure
Hamar Weyne Urban Renewal
📍 Hamar Weyne, Mogadishu
Integrated urban renewal covering road works, drainage, and public space improvements across the old town district.
Drainage
Warta Nabadda Flood Control
📍 Warta Nabadda, Mogadishu
Culvert and open channel drainage installation to manage flash flooding affecting over 8,000 households.

We Use Cookies

We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. By continuing to browse, you agree to our Privacy Policy and use of cookies.

Legal Document

Privacy Policy & Cookie Notice

Last updated: January 2025 · Mogadishu Construction & Rehabilitation

1. Introduction

Mogadishu Construction and Rehabilitation (MCR) is committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information when you visit our website or contact us regarding our services.

By using our website, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. If you disagree, please discontinue use of our site.

2. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

  • Contact Information — Name, email address, phone number, and message content submitted via our contact form.
  • Usage Data — Information about how you access and use our website, including IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent.
  • Cookies & Tracking — Small data files stored on your device to improve website functionality and user experience.

3. How We Use Your Information

The information we collect is used to:

  • Respond to your enquiries and provide project quotations
  • Improve and maintain our website performance
  • Send relevant project updates (only with your consent)
  • Comply with legal obligations and regulatory requirements in Somalia
  • Analyse website traffic to improve user experience

4. Cookie Policy

We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Cookies are small text files placed on your device. We use the following types:

Essential Cookies
Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
Analytics Cookies
Help us understand how visitors interact with our site.
Functional Cookies
Remember your preferences for a better experience.
Map Cookies
Used by OpenStreetMap to display our location map.

You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences at any time. Note that disabling cookies may affect website functionality.

5. Data Sharing & Third Parties

MCR does not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with:

  • Our international development partners (UN-Habitat, UNDP, UNICEF, World Bank, AfDB, EU, USAID) strictly for project-related purposes
  • Service providers who assist in operating our website, under strict confidentiality agreements
  • Legal authorities when required by Somali law or international obligations

6. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access — Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
  • Rectification — Request correction of inaccurate information
  • Erasure — Request deletion of your personal data
  • Objection — Object to processing of your personal data
  • Withdrawal — Withdraw consent at any time

7. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. We strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your data but cannot guarantee absolute security.

8. Contact Us

For any privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, please contact:

Mogadishu Construction & Rehabilitation
📍 KM5, Maka Al Mukarama Road, Mogadishu, Somalia
✉️ privacy@mcr-somalia.so
📞 +252 61 234 5678
